noServerDescription: Add a RabbitMQ server connection to monitor connections and channels.
selectServerPrompt: Please select a RabbitMQ server to view connections.
noActiveConnectionsDesc: There are currently no active connections to this RabbitMQ server.
stateBlockedTooltip: Connection is waiting for broker acknowledgment. May indicate slow consumers or memory pressure.
stateFlowTooltip: Flow control active — the broker is throttling this connection to prevent overload.
stateClosingTooltip: Connection is being torn down. No action needed.
maxChannelsTooltip: Highest channel count on a single connection. 50+ may indicate resource contention; 100+ is critical.
searchPlaceholder: Filter by name, user, vhost, or node...
